title: Sanding Rose Quartz - Biomes O' Plenty
description: Allows you to sand your rose quartz from Biomes O' Plenty into polished rose quartz from Create.
body:
Allows you to sand your rose quartz from [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty) into polished rose quartz from [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

I didn't see anything for 1.21.1 so I made my own
